race.comment: DOUBLE THE FUN (2) will find this much easier than what he faced last time out in the Challenge Stakes. That form has already been franked and coming back to this level looks ideal. Fiore should get a lovely run in transit and a return to winning form is on the cards. SPACE ACADEMY (9) ticks plenty of boxes coming here third-up into the campaign and getting the blinkers on for the first time. His two runs back have been solid since coming across from NSW and this presents as a winning opportunity. Can end his winning drought. FEY KING (1) stuck on well first-up over 1400m after being off the scene for 846 days. He'll only be better for that run and Pike sticking with him is a positive sign. Can improve now and put his best foot forward. GINGER AND TONIC (6) wasn't far away here last week and is not to be discounted. MILLY'S CLEVER TOO (8) is next best.
